hero.headline: Bid online and win.
hero.subline: List items, place your bids and win the lot when the auction ends.

step1.title: Browse
step1.text: Explore live auctions and find what interests you.

step2.title: Bid
step2.text: Place your bid and keep an eye on the remaining time.

step3.title: Win & pay
step3.text: As the highest bidder you win when it ends and pay securely.
